form.formComment: Comes off a 33 day let-up. Last start ran last in a small field at this track in the G3 on March 7 over 3500m, on slow going 25 len behind Nador carrying 63kg at $22. Race before finished second of 9 starters at this track on February 23 over 3500m, on heavy track; 1.3 len behind Tavaco carrying 67kg at $16. Might find this a bit too tough.

form.formComment: Racing well. Freshened for 45 days. Last outing won by 3 len this track in a LR on February 23 over 3600m in the wet defeating Muloughboy with 65.5kg at $8 in a hurdle. The start before that; finished third of 7 starters at Pau on January 7 over 3300m, 5.5 len behind Minuit Du Seuil with 70kg at $3.10. Ideally placed to win again.

form.formComment: Third-up today. Resuming ran on from midfield and won by 0.5 len this track on March 1 over 3500m defeating Novak carrying 71kg at $12 in a hurdle. Second run from a spell raced on the speed and boxed on steadily finished fifth of 7 runners at this track on March 22 over 3500m, on slow going 7 len behind Good Girl De Faust with 67kg at $2.70. Better than that and can make amends.

form.formComment: Second-up today. Fresh up after four months won by 0.8 len this track on March 14 over 3500m in the wet defeating Oublieux carrying 65kg at $2.90 in a steeplechase. form.formComment: Second-up today. Not raced for 39 days. Fresh up after three months ran on from midfield; finished fourth of 7 runners at Toulouse on March 1 over 3500m, 9 len behind Montana Dream carrying 65kg at $7.20. Previously second-up finished third of 13 runners at this track on November 5 over 3500m, 9 len behind Selma De Vary carrying 67kg at $11. Will strip fitter but needs to go up a notch.
